defs: The quality or state of being bitter, sharp, or acrid, in either a literal or figurative sense; implacableness; resentfulness; severity; keenness of reproach or sarcasm; deep distress, grief, or vexation of mind.
quotes: The lip that curls with bitterness.
I will complain in the bitterness of my soul.

defs: A state of extreme impiety or enmity to God.
quotes: Thou art in the gall of bitterness, and in the bond of iniquity.

defs: Dangerous error, or schism, tending to draw persons to apostasy.
quotes: Looking diligently, . . . lest any root of bitterness springing up trouble you.
